business.headline: Final call for taxpayers: 5 easy ways to reduce your tax before March 31 endsWith just hours left before the financial year closes, tax planning becomes urgent. The good news is that some easy investment options can still help you reduce your tax if you act quickly. Let's have a look.

US gasoline crosses $4 a gallon amid Iran war, highest since 2022The US national average retail price of gasoline moved past the $4 mark on Monday. The last time prices were at this level was in August 2022, following Russia's invasion of Ukraine.
Are banks open or closed on Mahavir Jayanti 2026?If you are visiting a bank today for personal work, it is best to check in advance whether your branch is open and what services are available.

IRDAI to introduce simple health covers, rate insurers and hospitals: ReportIRDAI's new steps aim to improve transparency and accountability in the health insurance sector, while addressing long-standing issues such as claim delays, billing disputes, and low insurance penetration.

ITR forms for AY 2026–27 out: Who can file ITR-1 and when should you choose ITR-2?The income tax filing season is here again, and the first step is knowing which form to pick. While ITR-1 works for many, others may need ITR-2, but how do you decide which one applies to you?

US Defense Secretary's broker looked to buy defence fund before Iran attackAccording to the FT report, the investment discussed by Hegseth's broker did not ultimately go ahead as the fund, which launched in May last year, was not yet available for Morgan Stanley clients to buy.

Opening a women-centric bank account? Here's what to actually look forAccording to government data, women today account for nearly 39 percent of bank account holders and contribute close to 40 percent of total deposits in the country.

What is tax-loss harvesting and how can it help you save tax?Tax loss harvesting has become more relevant as stock markets have seen volatility and many investors are sitting on losses in equities. At the same time, assets like gold and silver have delivered strong returns, leading to higher tax liability for some investors.

Is stock market closed or open today? Check NSE, BSE holiday for Mahavir JayantiMarkets will remain shut on March 31 for Mahavir Jayanti and again on April 3 for Good Friday. This means that out of five trading days in the week, markets will be open only for three sessions.

Are buyers choosing paint for identity, not just performance?The paint market is evolving not only in terms of technology but also in consumer expectations. Today's buyers increasingly seek products that reflect their identity and values, rather than just deliver functional outcomes.

From PPF, NSC to SSY: Check latest small savings scheme rates for April–June 2026Looking to invest in small savings schemes this quarter? The latest interest rates for PPF, NSC and SSY are out for April–June 2026, and here's what you need to know.

Oil market well supplied, US to retake control of Hormuz, says Scott BessentUS Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the United States is preparing for a scenario where it would ensure safe passage through the strategic waterway, either through direct naval escorts or a multinational effort.
Made an ITR mistake? File ITR-U before March 31 deadlineMissed reporting some income or spotted an error in your tax return? There's still time to correct it with ITR-U before March 31.

India opens OALP-XI, offers 21 blocks to boost oil and gas explorationThe previous round, OALP-10, had offered about 25 blocks covering 182,589 square kilometres. With the addition of OALP-XI, the government is expanding exploration opportunities across both land and offshore areas.

India prepares economic safeguards as Middle East conflict intensifies: ReportA key worry is the Strait of Hormuz, a major route through which nearly one-fifth of the world's oil supply passes. Any disruption here can quickly affect global supply and prices.

Sensex ends 1,635 points down, Nifty below 22,400; banking stocks tumbleThe S&P BSE Sensex was down by 1.635.67 points to close at 71,947.55, while the NSE Nifty50 tanked 488.20 points to end at 22,331.40.

Crude oil at $115 per barrel: Why are prices going up and what to expect next?Crude oil is climbing and refusing to cool, even as markets expected relief. What is really driving this surge, and how high can prices go from here?

Rupee slips past 95 against US dollar for 1st time despite RBI interventionRupee fell to a record low of 95.20 per dollar, down 0.3% during the day, as pressure continued to build from global factors and sustained foreign outflows.

Meal vouchers to company cars: What happens to your workplace perks from April 1?As April 1 approaches, changes in tax rules could alter how your workplace perks are treated. From meal vouchers to company cars, will these benefits still work in your favour or add to your tax burden?

Gold near Rs 1.48 lakh, silver above Rs 2.28 lakh: Invest now or wait?Gold prices are inching towards Rs 1.48 lakh and silver is trading above Rs 2.28 lakh, reflecting steady recovery. But with mixed global cues and uncertain trends, is this the right moment to invest or should you wait?

entertainment.headline: Wheel of Fortune: Akshay Kumar admits feeling small around highly educated people Akshay Kumar recently shared that he feels very small in front of highly educated people. The actor advised Wheel of Fortune viewers to value education after sharing his own insecurities.

Dhurandhar 2 becomes first Hindi film to cross Rs 100 crore in Karnataka Dhurandhar 2 has crossed Rs 100 crore in Karnataka, becoming the first Hindi film to achieve the milestone and rewriting box office trends in a traditionally Kannada-dominated market.

Amid Dhurandhar buzz, author Harinder Sikka says trusting Meghna Gulzar was a mistake Author Harinder Sikka openly criticised filmmaker Meghna Gulzar's adaptation of his work amid renewed espionage drama interest.

Syndey Sweeney's The Housemaid's Secret release date announced. Check here The Housemaid's Secret, the sequel to the hit thriller The Housemaid, is set to release in 2027. The sequel stars Sydney Sweeney, Michele Morrone and Kirsten Dunst.

Prakash Raj's mother dies at 86, Pawan Kalyan offers heartfelt condolences Actor Prakash Raj's mother Suvarnalatha died at the age of 86 due to health issues. Andhra Pradesh Deputy Chief Minister and actor Pawan Kalyan shared a condolence message on X.

Alka Yagnik opens up about ongoing battle with hearing loss, pauses new projects Alka Yagnik revealed she is still battling a rare hearing disorder more than a year after her diagnosis, keeping her away from new projects.

Ranbir Kapoor explains Lord Ram's legacy, shares 1st glimpse of Ramayana role in LA Ranbir Kapoor unveiled the first glimpse of his character, Lord Rama, from Nitesh Tiwari's Ramayana at a special Los Angeles screening. The actor reflected on the legacy of "Maryada Puroshattam" ahead of the film's India reveal on Hanuman Jayanti.

Anupam Kher slams propaganda tag on Dhurandhar 2: People are not idiots Anupam Kher slammed critics calling Dhurandhar 2 propaganda, saying audiences aren't idiots as the Ranveer Singh-starrer sees housefull theatres. Speaking at the International Film Festival Delhi, the veteran actor urged people to ignore irrelevant voices and celebrate the film's success.

Thaai Kizhavi on OTT: When and where to watch Radhikaa Sarathkumar's Tamil drama Thaai Kizhavi, a Tamil rural drama featuring Radikaa Sarathkumar, has been a major hit at the box office and is now set to premiere on JioHotstar. Produced by Sivakarthikeyan Productions, the film's engaging story and strong performances have won positive reviews across India.

Shot Dhurandhar, Ramayana back-to-back with Ranveer, Ranbir: Actor Abhay Arora Actor Abhay Arora opened up about shooting Dhurandhar and Ramayana simultaneously with Ranveer Singh and Ranbir Kapoor. He also addressed propaganda claims around Dhurandhar and shared his experience of working with director Aditya Dhar.

BTS makes waves again as Swim debuts at number 1 on Billboard Hot 100 Global sensation BTS returned with Swim from ARIRANG, which debuted at number 1 on Billboard Hot 100. The single also broke into India's competitive streaming charts, marking a milestone for K-pop in the country.

Taylor Swift sued over The Life Of A Showgirl album title trademark infringement Taylor Swift has been embroiled in a trademark infringement lawsuit filed for The Life of a Showgirl album title. Swift released the album in 2025.

Ajith cooks his signature biriyani while wife Shalini playfully teases him. Video Ajith Kumar and wife Shalini were seen sharing a light-hearted moment at an FC Madras event in Chennai. The video is going viral with fans admiring their playful chemistry.

Arjun Rampal looks back at career after Dhurandhar 2 success: Over the moon Actor Arjun Rampal celebrated the success of Dhurandhar and Dhurandhar 2, reflecting on his journey from his debut Moksha to becoming a consistent presence in the industry. He expressed gratitude to fans and collaborators for their support.

Ramayana teaser cleared by censors, rating and runtime revealed ahead of release The teaser for Nitesh Tiwari's Ramayana, starring Ranbir Kapoor, has been cleared by the CBFC. This clearance paves the way for the teaser's release, building excitement ahead of the film's April 2 premiere.

Dhurandhar 2's YouTube link removed after fans alert makers of pirated leak Ranveer Singh's Dhurandhar: The Revenge was illegally uploaded on YouTube by some users. The pirated link was taken down swiftly after fans alerted the makers.

Dhurandhar 2 box office Day 12: All-time 4th highest worldwide; can it beat Dangal? Dhurandhar 2 is slowly inching towards the Rs 1,500 crore gross haul at the worldwide box office. The film is already the fourth highest-grossing Indian film and second top Bollywood film globally.

Project Hail Mary and Ryan Gosling's run as Hollywood's eternal almost-superstar Ryan Gosling's steady ascent challenges Hollywood norms with Project Hail Mary. His stellar performance has won hearts and box office records alike. Yet, why does he remain Hollywood's understated hero rather than its loud superstar?

Kubbra Sait on returning for Farzi S2: Signed both seasons instantly Actor Kubbra Sait is set to return in Farzi Season 2, reflecting on how Sacred Games became a defining turning point in her career. She emphasised consistency over pressure, focusing on personal growth and authenticity in her acting journey.

general news.headline: Gulf turns to a country 4,000 km away to defeat Iran's Shahed dronesSince the war began, the US and its Gulf allies have relied on expensive air defence systems to shoot down cheap Iranian drones. It has saddled them with a bill in tens of billions of dollars. Now, a country that has learnt how to stop these drones in a cheaper, smarter way has come to the rescue.

Trump eyes early Iran war exit. But Arab allies push for decisive fire. Why?After five weeks of fighting, US President Donald Trump is reportedly planning an early exit from the Iran war, leaving the choked Strait of Hormuz in Tehran's hands. However, the US's Gulf allies are pushing Washington for continued hostilities against Iran. Why do Saudi Arabia, Kuwait and the UAE want the war to continue?

Jaish chief Masood Azhar's brother dies under mysterious circumstances in PakistanTahir Anwar was closely associated with Jaish-e-Mohammed and had been active in the outfit's operations for years. His death was confirmed through the group's official channel, which said his funeral would be held late Monday night at Jamia Masjid Usman Wali in Bahawalpur.

Tennis icon Leander Paes joins BJP ahead of Bengal assembly pollsHe was inducted into the party in a press conference, where Union Minister Kiren Rijiju and former state BJP chief Sukanta Majumdar were present.

The nuclear genie is out of the bottle. A mad rush for nukes has begunThe strikes on Iran are pushing countries in Europe and Asia to rethink their position on nuclear weapons. Nations like Japan, South Korea, Turkey and Saudi Arabia are considering building their own nuclear arsenal. Experts warn of a race for nuclear arms, which could make the world a more dangerous place.

Iran approves Strait of Hormuz toll plan, bans US, Israeli vesselsFormally announced by a member of the National Security Commission, the plan also highlights several key components, including enhanced security arrangements, ship safety protocols, and environmental protection measures.

Bengaluru techie dies by suicide, wife jumps off 17th floor after finding bodyPreliminary investigation suggested ongoing marital discord behind the couple's decision to take their own lives. Authorities are also probing whether Reddy's health issues played a role in the incident.
New cancer drug made brain tumour almost disappear in 5 daysA new cancer drug, still in the experimental phase, showed near-complete tumour shrinkage in the brain.

How Yami Gautam's father shaped Satinder Sartaaj's signature Sufi lookWhen Aditya Dhar approached Satinder Sartaaj for the song, their conversation went beyond music. The Sufi icon also brought up Yami Gautam's father during the interaction. He shared the anecdote while performing at a Sufi festival in Delhi.

Live: UAE on high alert as defence systems tackle Iranian missiles, dronesUS-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: As the Iran-US-Israel conflict intensifies, multiple flashpoints are emerging across the region, signalling a dangerous escalation. White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt said President Donald Trump is open to asking Middle Eastern allies to help finance ongoing military operations against Iran, even as Tehran insists it will not step back without compensation. Meanwhile, thousands of US Army troops from the elite 82nd Airborne Division have begun arriving in the region, deepening Washington's military footprint.  Iranian sources also claimed a Mahan Air civilian plane bound for New Delhi on a humanitarian medicines mission was struck at Mashhad airport. In Tehran, Supreme Leader Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei, in a fourth written statement, hailed Revolutionary Guard Navy chief Alireza Tangsiri as a brave symbol of Iran's Gulf presence. He was killed last week in a strike. Stay with IndiaToday.in for the latest and live updates.

Iran weapons depot reportedly hit by 900-kg bomb, Trump shares explosion videoTrump offered no context for the video, but media reports suggested that the visuals showed a US strike on an ammunition depot in Isfahan, a city of 2.3 million people and home to Iran's Badr military airbase.

Second-season syndrome? Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is a glitch in the matrixRR vs CSK: Conventional wisdom says a sophomore slump is inevitable for young cricketing sensations. But as his latest blitz against Chennai Super Kings in IPL 2026 shows, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is defying that notion.

Couple wakes up to cobra hissing near bed in Thailand hotel. Video is viralA couple's terrifying encounter with a venomous cobra in Krabi has gone viral, highlighting urgent wildlife safety needs in tourist hotels.

Cracked such a complex deal for free IPL tickets: Tejasvi Surya jabs Karnataka governmentShivakumar on Monday met with officials of the Karnataka State Cricket Association before announcing that every Karnataka MLA will receive three free tickets to watch IPL matches at the Chinnaswamy Stadium.
Scientists confirm AI data centres creating heat islands: What is itIn extreme cases, the jump can be as high as the difference between a pleasant Delhi winter morning and a scorching May afternoon.

8 women killed in stampede at temple in Bihar's Nalanda, probe orderedEight women were killed as overcrowding at the Shitala Temple in Bihar's Nalanda district triggered a stampede during a religious gathering. Disturbing pictures from the accident site showed scores of women lying unconscious on the ground.

More rain over Maharashtra: Satellite captures big clouds rollingWeather observers tracking the system say the cloud mass, which earlier hovered over parts of North India, is now shifting southward and intensifying over western India.

'I multiplied myself': Taboola CEO reveals how Claude AI agents run his dayTaboola CEO Adam Singolda says he begins his day with AI agents built using Claude that automate research and prep his meetings before he even starts work. He also uses them to build learning tools for his kids, highlighting how AI is rapidly becoming a powerful daily collaborator.

Trump eyes early Iran war exit, reopening Hormuz may not be a priorityAccording to an assessment, any attempt to reopen the Strait of Hormuz would be complex and could push the US military campaign beyond Trump's timeline of six weeks, officials told the Wall Street Journal.

Watch: 2,000-km-long wall of dust seen blowing through Sahara DesertDust storms of this magnitude can have widespread impacts. In affected areas, visibility can drop sharply, disrupting transportation and posing risks to aviation.

How Amit Shah delivered a 90-minute takedown of Opposition over NaxalismAmit Shah listened in silence, sharpened his arguments, and rose to unleash a calculated political offensive that would dominate the Lok Sabha for the next 90 minutes.
Role Reversal: Tamil Nadu's Triumphs, Trends & Turmoils | Part 38

British broadcast engineer covering IPL found dead in Mumbai hotelBritish broadcast engineer Ian Langford, covering IPL matches, was found dead in his Mumbai hotel room. Police have registered an unnatural death case, with no signs of foul play, as the investigation continues.

Anupam Kher slams propaganda tag on Dhurandhar 2: People are not idiotsAnupam Kher slammed critics calling Dhurandhar 2 propaganda, saying audiences aren't idiots as the Ranveer Singh-starrer sees housefull theatres. Speaking at the International Film Festival Delhi, the veteran actor urged people to ignore irrelevant voices and celebrate the film's success.

sports.headline: No T20s for Shreyas Iyer since IPL final: Should Punjab Kings be worried? IPL 2026, PBKS vs GT: Ambati Rayudu has backed Shreyas Iyer to hit the ground running for Punjab Kings despite not playing a T20 since last year's IPL final, saying the experienced skipper should have no trouble settling in.

KKR piling pressure on Cameron Green? Australia coach raises price tag concerns IPL 2026: Australia head coach Andrew McDonald backed Cameron Green amid rising expectations after KKR's opening loss. With a back niggle limiting his bowling, the all-rounder's role remains under focus early in the season.

Vaibhav Sooryavanshi backed to break Tendulkar's record with India debut in England Michael Vaughan has backed a bold early India call-up for Vaibhav Sooryavanshi after the RR teenager's explosive 15-ball fifty against CSK, saying he should be taken on the white-ball tour of England later this year.

Ravindra Jadeja offers first real measure of the CSK trade narrative IPL 2026: Ravindra Jadeja offered the first telling response in the RR-CSK trade narrative, using control, variation and awareness to shape the game in Guwahati and underline his enduring T20 value.

Ryan Williams debut hints at new Indian football era despite chaos Ryan Williams is set to make his India debut in a dead rubber against Hong Kong. While the campaign has faltered, his arrival hints at a potential shift in India's footballing future.

What makes Vaibhav Sooryavanshi stand out? Aakash Chopra explains after CSK blitz IPL 2026, RR vs CSK: Aakash Chopra praised Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's unique bat swing, exceptional wrist work, and explosive power, saying the 15-year-old's technique is unlike anything he has seen before.

Confused Chennai's selection strategy faces scrutiny after Rajasthan horror IPL 2026, RR vs CSK: Former India spinner Piyush Chawla criticised the five-time champions for looking confused and underprepared during their eight-wicket loss to Rajasthan Royals in Guwahati.

CSK has no place for doubts: Hussey backs players to rise back from RR thrashing IPL 2026: CSK batting coach Mike Hussey backed the team's batting unit despite a heavy loss, urging players to stay clear in their approach. He emphasised that one poor performance should not create doubt early in the season.

Ravindra Jadeja on Shivam Dube wicket celebration: Why not continue it here too IPL 2026, RR vs CSK: Ravindra Jadeja talked about his celebration after dismissing Shivam Dube in the clash between Chennai Super Kings and Rajasthan Royals on Monday in Guwahati.

Noise never gets to me: Riyan Parag shuts RR captaincy critics after CSK win IPL 2026: Riyan Parag shrugged off captaincy criticism after leading RR to a dominant win over CSK. He emphasised that external noise does not affect his approach as he focusses on improving decisions on the field

IPL Play of the Day: Burger too hot for CSK, Archer goes vintage in Guwahati IPL 2026: Jofra Archer and Nandre Burger swung the game early in Guwahati, exploiting helpful conditions to rip through CSK's top order, setting the tone for a Royals performance built on relentless pressure.

Praggnanandhaa holds joint lead in Candidates after hard-fought draw vs Wei YiR Praggnanandhaa held Wei Yi to a draw to stay joint leader after two rounds of the Candidates. The second round saw a calmer day, with most games ending without a winner.
More chaos in PSL: Shaheen Afridi fined for breaching security protocolLahore Qalandars impose strict fine on Afridi to uphold PSL security standards

Second-season syndrome? Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is a glitch in the matrixRR vs CSK: Conventional wisdom says a sophomore slump is inevitable for young cricketing sensations. But as his latest blitz against Chennai Super Kings in IPL 2026 shows, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is defying that notion.

IPL 2026: Gill, Iyer eye T20 redemption as PBKS test GT in season openerIPL 2026: Shubman Gill and Shreyas Iyer headline a clash where both captains are eager to stamp their authority in T20 cricket. While PBKS will be keen to prove last season was no fluke, GT will look to lean on their overall balance and iron out lingering middle-order concerns.

Paid for T20, got a Test: CSK's flop show in Guwahati triggers memes, refund criesCSK's IPL 2026 opener turned into a nightmare as 127 proved nowhere near enough and Rajasthan Royals romped home in Guwahati. Fans were left fuming, joking they had paid for a Test match.

How is Vaibhav doing this? RR captain amazed by youngster's power-hitting vs CSKRajasthan Royals captain Riyan Parag admitted he was left wondering "how is he doing this?" as teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi blazed a breathtaking 15-ball half-century, powering RR to a commanding eight-wicket win over Chennai Super Kings in their IPL 2026 opener in Guwahati on Monday.

Sooryavanshi storm blows in Guwahati, familiar woes haunt new-look ChennaiIPL 2026, RR vs CSK: Rajasthan Royals kickstarted their campaign with a statement win as Vaibhav Sooryavanshi backed up a clinical bowling effort with a ferocious 52 in an eight-wicket thrashing of Chennai Super Kings.

Shubman Gill's clarity marks his evolution as batter and leader for GT: HaydenGujarat Titans batting coach Matthew Hayden has praised captain Shubman Gill for his development both as a batter and a leader. Hayden highlighted Gill's clarity of thought and modern confidence as key factors in his growth at the highest level of cricket.

Ravindra Jadeja gives ex-teammate, Shivam Dube fiery send-off in season openerIPL 2026: Ravindra Jadeja's fiery send-off to Shivam Dube adds edge to IPL 2026 opener as his double strike shifts momentum, while Sanju Samson endures a quiet debut for CSK against RR.

Pakistan fine Naseem Shah PKR 20 million for controversial social media postThe Pakistan Cricket Board (PCB) has imposed a fine of PKR 20 million on fast bowler Naseem Shah for a social media post that criticised the presence of a politician at the Pakistan Super League (PSL) opening game, which took place behind closed doors last week.

Who is Brijesh Sharma? Uncapped pacer makes IPL debut for Rajasthan RoyalsIPL 2026: Brijesh Sharma makes his IPL debut for Rajasthan Royals after a tough journey from Jammu and Kashmir, with RR opting to field against Chennai Super Kings.

Sanju Samson fails on CSK debut, ends stellar IPL opener streak vs RRChennai Super Kings opener Sanju Samson failed on his CSK debut after Nandre Burger castled him for six in the IPL 2026 clash against Rajasthan Royals at Guwahati's Barsapara Cricket Stadium on Monday.

RR vs CSK Highlights: Rajasthan Royals smash Chennai Super Kings, win by 8 wicketsRajasthan (RR) vs Chennai (CSK) Highlights, IPL 2026: Rajasthan Royals complete a dominant victory as Riyan Parag's captaincy era begins with a statement win in his hometown in Guwahati.

Vaibhav Sooryavanshi sets title goal for Rajasthan Royals after breakout seasonIPL 2026: Rajasthan Royals opener Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is eyeing a title-winning campaign after his breakout season, as the teenage prodigy reflects on his rise and sets his sights on leading from the front.

Fakhar Zaman guilty of ball tampering. Will Lahore Qalandars be banned from PSL?PSL: Lahore Qalandars' batter Fakhar Zaman has been charged of ball tampering by the Pakistan Cricket Board. Will he or Lahore Qalandars be banned from the league?

IPL Big Name Watch: Rohit Sharma at 38, looks far from finished in IPLRohit Sharma's quickfire fifty in MI's opener hinted at more than just form. With sharper intent and better control, the 38-year-old may be entering a phase where his best IPL season still lies ahead.

No IPL broadcast in Bangladesh after JioStar scraps dealThere will be no broadcast of IPL matches in Bangladesh, due to JioStar scrapping the deal. The deal was terminated due to payment defaults by TSports, leaving no official broadcaster in place for the season.

MI supporter proposes to KKR fan at Wankhede, ends up losing ring in standsIPL: An MI supporter's proposal to a KKR fan at Wankhede briefly turned chaotic after he dropped the ring mid-moment, sparking a frantic search before the story found its happy ending.

CSK in Dhoni-Samson transition phase? CEO Kashi Vishwanathan sparks buzzIPL 2026: CSK's transition from MS Dhoni to Sanju Samson may already be taking shape. With Dhoni sidelined, the franchise now has an early chance to test its future core this season.

Tiger Woods' partner issues final warning after car crash, reveals insiderTiger Woods' partner Vanessa Trump has reportedly issued a final warning to the golfer after his DUI arrest and car crash, with insiders claiming she is "not happy at all" and demanding that he get his life under control or risk losing the relationship.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

NTA issues clarification after NEET result controversy over toppers, high cut-offIn a detailed statement, the National Testing Agency (NTA) said that the increase in cut-off and number of toppers in the NEET-UG reflect the competitive nature of the exam and maintained that the test's integrity has not been compromised.

Exclusive: Arvind Kejriwal claims 'BJP succession war, PM backing Amit Shah'Speaking exclusively to India Today TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal claimed that there is a "succession war" within the BJP. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

4 medical students arrested in Bihar for appearing as proxies for NEET aspirantsFour MBBS students who appeared in place of NEET aspirants in the medical entrance exam were detained in Bihar's Purnea.

NEET-UG question paper not leaked, claims baseless: National Testing AgencyThe reports claiming question paper leak in the medical entrance exam NEET-UG are "completely baseless and without any ground", the National Testing Agency (NTA) has clarified.
The generation with answers: Tech-savvy Indian youth tackling global challengesIndia's tech-savvy youth rewriting the global narrative, one solution at a time.

Left sweeps JNU students' polls, Dhananjay is first Dalit presidentThe Left swept the Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls, winning all four posts and trouncing the RSS-affiliated ABVP. The ABVP was leading at one point, but the Left eventually surged ahead and emerged victorious.
The power of knowledge: Education's influence on real estate market trendsIn a dynamic sector like real estate, investing in continuing education is not simply an option; it is a requirement.

JNU students' body election on March 22 after 4 yearsThe Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls will take place on March 22, more than four years after the last elections were held in September 2019.

UP 12th board exam math, biology papers leaked on WhatsApp, complaint filedThe mathematics and biology question papers for the Uttar Pradesh class 12 board exam were allegedly leaked on a WhatsApp group.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
